mentions.note: Travel & leisure challenged by gas prices and geopolitical tensions but Wells Fargo sees inflection; CEO Brian Chesky 'real'; at right price level to buy.

Data center infrastructure networking; stock surging; powers connectivity between massive Nvidia/AMD/Google/Amazon chip arrays.
Partnership with Nvidia for self-driving operating system; backed up from $2 lows; Cramer describes as 'vampire' stock; to investigate further.

Data center optical networking and connectivity; one of the red-hot stocks driving AI infrastructure revolution.
Photonics to move signals in data centers; on the show but stock soared; uses light instead of copper for interconnects.

Data center hardware provider; Cramer asks 'How did I miss Dell?'; selling servers and infrastructure to hyperscalers at scale.

Strong hold; caller up $60 from $275; Cramer says sellers will lose, heading to $400; best growth/profitability story with durable moat.

Data center networking hardware; stock doubled; critical for hyperscaler connectivity and chip communication; 'on fire.'
Memory and storage critical for AI infrastructure; shortages persist as demand outpaces industry capacity to build.

Memory shortage play; stock at $957, up $75 (8.4%) today on multiple buyers with high-top orders; capacity expansion will take years.
Memory and storage shortages drive AI data center buildout; stock rallies daily on persistent buyer demand but Cramer missed it.
